title: Jal Shey Advisor armor
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Jal_shey_advisor_armor.jpg|thumb|Jal Shey Advisor armor]]
'''Jal Shey Advisor armor''', as its name implies, was worn by [[Jal Shey]] [[Jal Shey Advisor|Advisors]]. These advisors possessed a strong understanding of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. Though tougher than the similar armor used by [[Jal Shey Neophyte armor|neophytes]], this armor was still very lightweight and once again did not interfere with usage of [[Force power/Legends|Force powers]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-12-21 -->[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords'': Prima Official Game Guide]]
